title: Cricketer Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's Uncle Abhishek Chauhan Cracks UPSC Exam In First Attempt
description: UPSC Civil Services Exam 2025 Result: In his first attempt, Abhishek Chauhan cleared both the preliminary and main stages in 2025 and appeared for the interview in 2026, where he answered the panel's questions confidently.
